target.title: feat(telegram): opt-in interleaved progress lane
target.body:
## Summary

Add an opt-in Telegram renderer that projects reasoning text and structured runtime events into a single durable live message on the reasoning lane, matching CLI ergonomics without changing execution semantics.

**Gated on three conditions:** `toolProgressEnabled && interleavedProgress === true && hasReasoningLane` â€” inherits every existing group/DM/visibility gate.

## What it does

When `channels.telegram.streaming.preview.interleavedProgress` is enabled:
- Reasoning text streams into the interleaved message with a "Thinking" header
- Tool starts append a sanitized line (tool name only, never raw args by default)
- Item/plan/approval/command/patch events append title-only summary lines
- Rolling timer suffix shows elapsed time while running, cleared on completion
- Falls back to existing `pushStreamToolProgress` lane when the flag is off

## Key design choices

- **Projection-only** â€” no changes to prompts, model routing, tool execution, or auth
- **No raw data** â€” tool lines show name only; `interleavedToolArgs` is a separate opt-in for sanitized args
- **No new event contract** â€” consumes existing `onReasoningStream`, `onToolStart`, `onItemEvent`, `onPlanUpdate`, `onApprovalEvent`, `onCommandOutput`, `onPatchSummary` callbacks unchanged
- **Delta-append, single stream** â€” reasoning and assistant commentary are appended as monotonic deltas (a cumulative snapshot contributes only its new suffix), so re-delivery never duplicates and the lane reads chronologically reasoning â†’ commentary â†’ tool â†’ â€¦
- **Plain-text transcript** â€” reasoning tag markers (`<think>` etc.) are unwrapped so the lane shows the model's prose, never raw tags; the final answer that may stream through here is stripped back out at delivery so it shows once, polished, in the answer lane

## Depends on

- #80046 (CLI tool_use event bridge with sanitized args)
- #85381 (CLI thinking_delta events, stacked on #80046)

**Merge order is safe.** The feature is default-off and consumes only existing
callbacks. Without #85381, CLI `thinking_delta` content simply never reaches the
renderer â€” the interleaved lane then shows commentary plus tool/event lines
without CLI-native reasoning, degrading gracefully rather than breaking. Once
#85381 lands, reasoning content appears as advertised. Either way the default
tool-progress lane is unaffected, so this can merge before or after #85381.

## Changed files

- `extensions/telegram/src/interleaved-progress.ts` â€” pure render helpers (gate, sanitize, header-strip, message render, delta-append with cumulative-snapshot handling, final-answer dedup, status-line append)
- `extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.ts` â€” wire callbacks through renderer with fallback; single-stream delta append; reasoning-tag unwrapping; clear rolling timer in `finally`; strip the final answer from the lane at delivery
- `extensions/telegram/src/reasoning-lane-coordinator.ts` â€” `stripReasoningTagsForInterleaved` (unwrap `<think>` markers, preserving code regions)
- `src/config/types.telegram.ts` + `src/config/zod-schema.providers-core.ts` â€” opt-in flag schema
- Config surface docs + bundled channel metadata regeneration

## Test plan

- [x] Unit tests covering: disabled-by-default, explicit opt-out, tool-progress-off, no-reasoning-lane, header dedup, rolling-timer lifecycle, whitespace-collapse + length cap, delta-append no-duplication across a long cumulative stream, final-answer dedup, and reasoning-tag unwrapping (incl. literal tags inside code preserved)
- [x] Live Telegram verification with `interleavedProgress: true`

## Live proof (2026-05-29, current head)

**Gateway startup:**
```
2026-05-29T20:49:39 agent model: claude-cli-interactive/claude-opus-4-8 (thinking=max, fast=off)
2026-05-29T20:49:39 http server listening (6 plugins; 18.4s)
2026-05-29T20:49:40 gateway ready
```

**Turn dispatch (interactive proxy + session resume):**
```
2026-05-29T21:04:17 cli exec: provider=claude-cli-interactive model=claude-opus-4-6 trigger=user useResume=true session=present reuse=reusable
2026-05-29T21:04:17 cli argv: bun .../interactive-proxy/wrapper.ts --resume 23c8a0d6-... --model opus
```

**Telegram â€” reasoning + tool-use lines in the interleaved lane:**

![proof](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anagnorisis2peripeteia/openclaw/2ec1bed2aa0caf2a0a8311a458dcd1bc532ce68c/proof-assets/interleaved-progress-telegram-2026-05-29.jpg)

target.body:
## Summary

Add an opt-in Telegram renderer that projects reasoning text and structured runtime events into a single durable live message on the reasoning lane, matching CLI ergonomics without changing execution semantics.

**Gated on three conditions:** `toolProgressEnabled && interleavedProgress === true && hasReasoningLane` â€” inherits every existing group/DM/visibility gate.

## What it does

When `channels.telegram.streaming.preview.interleavedProgress` is enabled:
- Reasoning text streams into the interleaved message with a "Thinking" header
- Tool starts append a sanitized line (tool name only, never raw args by default)
- Item/plan/approval/command/patch events append title-only summary lines
- Rolling timer suffix shows elapsed time while running, cleared on completion
- Falls back to existing `pushStreamToolProgress` lane when the flag is off

## Key design choices

- **Projection-only** â€” no changes to prompts, model routing, tool execution, or auth
- **No raw data** â€” tool lines show name only; `interleavedToolArgs` is a separate opt-in for sanitized args
- **No new event contract** â€” consumes existing `onReasoningStream`, `onToolStart`, `onItemEvent`, `onPlanUpdate`, `onApprovalEvent`, `onCommandOutput`, `onPatchSummary` callbacks unchanged
- **Delta-append, single stream** â€” reasoning and assistant commentary are appended as monotonic deltas (a cumulative snapshot contributes only its new suffix), so re-delivery never duplicates and the lane reads chronologically reasoning â†’ commentary â†’ tool â†’ â€¦
- **Plain-text transcript** â€” reasoning tag markers (`<think>` etc.) are unwrapped so the lane shows the model's prose, never raw tags; the final answer that may stream through here is stripped back out at delivery so it shows once, polished, in the answer lane

## Depends on

- #80046 (CLI tool_use event bridge with sanitized args)
- #85381 (CLI thinking_delta events, stacked on #80046)

**Merge order is safe.** The feature is default-off and consumes only existing
callbacks. Without #85381, CLI `thinking_delta` content simply never reaches the
renderer â€” the interleaved lane then shows commentary plus tool/event lines
without CLI-native reasoning, degrading gracefully rather than breaking. Once
#85381 lands, reasoning content appears as advertised. Either way the default
tool-progress lane is unaffected, so this can merge before or after #85381.

## Changed files

- `extensions/telegram/src/interleaved-progress.ts` â€” pure render helpers (gate, sanitize, header-strip, message render, delta-append with cumulative-snapshot handling, final-answer dedup, status-line append)
- `extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.ts` â€” wire callbacks through renderer with fallback; single-stream delta append; reasoning-tag unwrapping; clear rolling timer in `finally`; strip the final answer from the lane at delivery
- `extensions/telegram/src/reasoning-lane-coordinator.ts` â€” `stripReasoningTagsForInterleaved` (unwrap `<think>` markers, preserving code regions)
- `src/config/types.telegram.ts` + `src/config/zod-schema.providers-core.ts` â€” opt-in flag schema
- Config surface docs + bundled channel metadata regeneration

## Test plan

- [x] Unit tests covering: disabled-by-default, explicit opt-out, tool-progress-off, no-reasoning-lane, header dedup, rolling-timer lifecycle, whitespace-collapse + length cap, delta-append no-duplication across a long cumulative stream, final-answer dedup, and reasoning-tag unwrapping (incl. literal tags inside code preserved)
- [x] Live Telegram verification with `interleavedProgress: true`

## Summary

Add an opt-in Telegram renderer that projects reasoning text and structured runtime events into a single durable live message on the reasoning lane, matching CLI ergonomics without changing execution semantics.

**Gated on three conditions:** `toolProgressEnabled && interleavedProgress === true && hasReasoningLane` â€” inherits every existing group/DM/visibility gate.

## What it does

When `channels.telegram.streaming.preview.interleavedProgress` is enabled:
- Reasoning text streams into the interleaved message with a "Thinking" header
- Tool starts append a sanitized line (tool name only, never raw args by default)
- Item/plan/approval/command/patch events append title-only summary lines
- Rolling timer suffix shows elapsed time while running, cleared on completion
- Falls back to existing `pushStreamToolProgress` lane when the flag is off

## Key design choices

- **Projection-only** â€” no changes to prompts, model routing, tool execution, or auth
- **No raw data** â€” tool lines show name only; `interleavedToolArgs` is a separate opt-in for sanitized args
- **No new event contract** â€” consumes existing `onReasoningStream`, `onToolStart`, `onItemEvent`, `onPlanUpdate`, `onApprovalEvent`, `onCommandOutput`, `onPatchSummary` callbacks unchanged
- **Delta-append, single stream** â€” reasoning and assistant commentary are appended as monotonic deltas (a cumulative snapshot contributes only its new suffix), so re-delivery never duplicates and the lane reads chronologically reasoning â†’ commentary â†’ tool â†’ â€¦
- **Plain-text transcript** â€” reasoning tag markers (`<think>` etc.) are unwrapped so the lane shows the model's prose, never raw tags; the final answer that may stream through here is stripped back out at delivery so it shows once, polished, in the answer lane

## Depends on

- #80046 (CLI tool_use event bridge with sanitized args)
- #85381 (CLI thinking_delta events, stacked on #80046)

tool-progress lane is unaffected, so this can merge before or after #85381.

- Reasoning text streams into the interleaved message with a "Thinking" header
- Tool starts append a sanitized line (tool name only, never raw args by default)
- Item/plan/approval/command/patch events append title-only summary lines
- Rolling timer suffix shows elapsed time while running, cleared on completion
- Falls back to existing `pushStreamToolProgress` lane when the flag is off

target.body:
## Summary

Add an opt-in Telegram renderer that projects reasoning text and structured runtime events into a single durable live message on the reasoning lane, matching CLI ergonomics without changing execution semantics.

**Gated on three conditions:** `toolProgressEnabled && interleavedProgress === true && hasReasoningLane` â€” inherits every existing group/DM/visibility gate.

## What it does

When `channels.telegram.streaming.preview.interleavedProgress` is enabled:
- Reasoning text streams into the interleaved message with a "Thinking" header
- Tool starts append a sanitized line (tool name only, never raw args by default)
- Item/plan/approval/command/patch events append title-only summary lines
- Rolling timer suffix shows elapsed time while running, cleared on completion
- Falls back to existing `pushStreamToolProgress` lane when the flag is off

## Key design choices

- **Projection-only** â€” no changes to prompts, model routing, tool execution, or auth
- **No raw data** â€” tool lines show name only; `interleavedToolArgs` is a separate opt-in for sanitized args
- **No new event contract** â€” consumes existing `onReasoningStream`, `onToolStart`, `onItemEvent`, `onPlanUpdate`, `onApprovalEvent`, `onCommandOutput`, `onPatchSummary` callbacks unchanged
- **Delta-append, single stream** â€” reasoning and assistant commentary are appended as monotonic deltas (a cumulative snapshot contributes only its new suffix), so re-delivery never duplicates and the lane reads chronologically reasoning â†’ commentary â†’ tool â†’ â€¦
- **Plain-text transcript** â€” reasoning tag markers (`<think>` etc.) are unwrapped so the lane shows the model's prose, never raw tags; the final answer that may stream through here is stripped back out at delivery so it shows once, polished, in the answer lane

## Depends on

- #80046 (CLI tool_use event bridge with sanitized args)
- #85381 (CLI thinking_delta events, stacked on #80046)

**Merge order is safe.** The feature is default-off and consumes only existing
callbacks. Without #85381, CLI `thinking_delta` content simply never reaches the
renderer â€” the interleaved lane then shows commentary plus tool/event lines
without CLI-native reasoning, degrading gracefully rather than breaking. Once
#85381 lands, reasoning content appears as advertised. Either way the default
tool-progress lane is unaffected, so this can merge before or after #85381.

## Changed files

- `extensions/telegram/src/interleaved-progress.ts` â€” pure render helpers (gate, sanitize, header-strip, message render, delta-append with cumulative-snapshot handling, final-answer dedup, status-line append)
- `extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.ts` â€” wire callbacks through renderer with fallback; single-stream delta append; reasoning-tag unwrapping; clear rolling timer in `finally`; strip the final answer from the lane at delivery
- `extensions/telegram/src/reasoning-lane-coordinator.ts` â€” `stripReasoningTagsForInterleaved` (unwrap `<think>` markers, preserving code regions)
- `src/config/types.telegram.ts` + `src/config/zod-schema.providers-core.ts` â€” opt-in flag schema
- Config surface docs + bundled channel metadata regeneration

## Test plan

- [x] Unit tests covering: disabled-by-default, explicit opt-out, tool-progress-off, no-reasoning-lane, header dedup, rolling-timer lifecycle, whitespace-collapse + length cap, delta-append no-duplication across a long cumulative stream, final-answer dedup, and reasoning-tag unwrapping (incl. literal tags inside code preserved)
- [x] Live Telegram verification with `interleavedProgress: true`
